artifacts.summary: Evaluates bridge vs refactor approaches; concludes bridge is mathematically standard and correct

partial_progress.details: Research report written addressing all three questions

findings.question_a: FlagBFMCS already provides history-relative times; refactoring FMCS is not needed
findings.question_b: Bridge approach is mathematically correct; separation is standard proof theory practice
findings.question_c: Recommendation: Build the bridge; do NOT refactor; risk too high, benefit too low

recommendations: Mark IntBFMCS F/P sorries as documented limitations, not blockers
Build semantic bridge as future task (low priority)
Domain transfer to Int/Rat is optional (for computational use only)
